hero.subtitle: I can do some great things for you.

footer.copy: I create modern landing pages for businesses.
footer.ctaTitle: Ready to launch your landing page?

hire.title: Ready to work together?
hire.subtitle: Tell me about your project and let's build something great.
hire.reply_time: I’ll get back to you within 24 hours.

work.subtitle: Selected works that demonstrate my skills and experience

items.question: How much does a landing page cost?
items.answer: The price depends on project complexity, number of sections and extra features. Typically pricing starts from a basic one-page site and is calculated individually after discussing your requirements.

items.question: How long does development take?
items.answer: A simple landing usually takes 3–7 days. It depends on content, revisions and approval speed.

items.question: Will the site be responsive?
items.answer: Yes — every landing is fully responsive for mobile, tablet and desktop and works correctly in modern browsers.

items.question: Can you help with deployment?
items.answer: Yes — I can help set up domain, hosting and deploy the site. I can also configure basic SEO.

items.question: Can I request changes after launch?
items.answer: Of course. After project completion I provide a period of free fixes and can offer ongoing support if needed.
